speaker: speaker1
text: Do you understand any other foreign languages besides English ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I know a little about Japanese which is similar to Chinese not only in culture but in language itself .

speaker: speaker1
text: What band did you pass in Japanese Language Proficiency Test ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I passed the Band two in LPT , but I will try to achieve Band one which is the highest level .
